results.validation_notes: The existing classification was 'Indeterminate' with confidence 0.72. With deep context, I can now confidently classify this as Layered Architecture. The catalog incorrectly listed Event-Driven style and technologies (Kafka/RabbitMQ) that are not present in the codebase. The catalog metadata also incorrectly listed Modular Monolith as the primary style - this is more accurately described as Layered (NestJS-based) with the packages being separate deployable artifacts (SDKs, GUI, integrations) rather than internal modules of a monolith.
